Video.summary: Creating a living space that works for both kids and adults shouldn't mean you have to compromise on grown-up style. By using natural fibers and turning tired items into fabulous new centerpieces, Samantha Pynn transforms a living/dining room from a playroom into a glamorous living space that's sophisticated enough for a busy working mom yet playful enough for her young daughter.
Video.title: Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room

Image.alt: Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room
Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room

Video.summary: The cottage-style charm that Virginia fell in love with when she bought her city home has lost its appeal. Designer Samantha Pynn takes it from outdated to 'Modern Country' - with an eco-twist.
Video.title: Pure Design: Virginia's Kitchen

Image.alt: Pure Design: Virginia's Kitchen
Pure Design: Virginia's Kitchen

Video.summary: Designer Samantha Pynn creates an eco-fabulous bedroom for 16-year-old Lindsay that perfectly balances youthful without looking childish - and still allows for room to grow.
Video.title: Pure Design: Lindsay's Teenage Bedroom

Image.alt: Pure Design: Lindsay's Teenage Bedroom
Pure Design: Lindsay's Teenage Bedroom

My Froggy Stuff: DIY Custom Paper Dolls - Hair & Fashion - Free Printables

Video.summary: Claudia and Justin are professional foodies - he's a chef and she's a food stylist. So it's no surprise that their urban loft space has a beautifully designed modern kitchen. Only problem is, the rest of the space doesn't measure up: it's a mishmash of Danish modern with other inherited and found pieces. Designer Samantha Pynn uses their showpiece kitchen as an inspiration and by recovering older teak pieces with eco-friendly fabrics and redoing the floor plan.
Video.title: Pure Design: Claudia & Justin's Living/Dining Room

Image.alt: Pure Design: Claudia & Justin's Living/Dining Room
Pure Design: Claudia & Justin's Living/Dining Room

Appalachian Handcrafts: Intention Setting & Meditation

Video.summary: Homeowners Helen and Niall are getting nervous - they're a few short months away from the birth of their first child and their never-renovated 1920s home doesn't contain a nursery. Both work full time - so they're relying on designer Samantha Pynn to create a bright and practical room for their new bundle of joy.
Video.title: Pure Design: Helen & Niall's Nursery

Image.alt: Pure Design: Helen & Niall's Nursery
Pure Design: Helen & Niall's Nursery

Video.summary: Today at My Froggy Stuff we've got another One of a kind Custom Doll!! This time Froggy creates her favorite YouTuber TraciJHines in this Fabsome One of a Kind Celebrity Custom Doll! From custom Ombre Hair (without rerooting!!) to a DIY Graphic Tee we've checked ALL the boxes!!

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we share a clever way to lets your kids know they are going to Disney.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Spring Crafts and More

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Spring Crafts and More
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Spring Crafts and More

Video.summary: Have you always wanted to learn how to Sew? Well now's your chance to have a lesson in the comfort of your own home. This easy to follow step by step programme will teach you the basics to get strated and then move on to some simple projects such as making a lined tote bag to practise what you have learnt. You will find out what equipment you'll need, larn some brilliant tips to make beautiful creations including a patchwork cushion and elasticated skirt!
Video.title: Learn to Sew

Image.alt: Learn to Sew
Learn to Sew

Video.summary: With some colorful paper and googly eyes, Kim teaches us how to bring to life animated watermelon.

Video.summary: Watch this DIY video tutorial to learn How to make a Spring Wreath. Adding colorful spring wreaths to your home is a fabulous way to make your space blossom with very little effort. Follow along with this home decor craft tutorial to create a stunning and bright project. This DIY craft is easy to make, and you can use just about any fabric you would like. Get started on your own DIY wreath for the most cheerful of seasons!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath
FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Video.summary: In today's video we'll be discussing the balancing act between art and life. From our personal struggles to solutions we cover it all! Sit back, relax and enjoy!!

Digital Painting - Frog Food: Balancing Art and Life - Speed Paint

Video.summary: Need a last minute gift idea!? Check out this Fabulous and EASY Doll Craft! Stay warm this Winter with these Fabsome Fuzzy Doll Slippers! Your dolls will LOVE these fabulous slippers and they make the perfect last minute gift on a budget!!
